## Problem / Motivation

Describe the problem this feature would solve, or the use case it enables.

## Proposed Solution

Describe what you'd like to see added or changed.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought about.

## Additional Context

Any other context, mockups, or examples.

> **Note:** AutoApply AI must remain 100% free-tier. Features requiring paid APIs will not be accepted.
